title: [Citadel, Outside Gates]
description: As would be expected of wizards, the normal drawbridge construction is missing from the entrance to the citadel.  Traversing the ravine that surrounds the citadel is a large contraption which resembles a balance with several levers and ropes attached.  On the other side of the ravine you can see two doors which form the entrance to the citadel.

wayto.11357:
;e empty_hands
old_stance = XMLData.stance_text
fput 'stance offensive' unless old_stance == 'offensive'
until !checkpaths
fput 'stand' unless standing?
fput 'climb ledge'
sleep 0.1
waitrt?
end
fput 'stance ' + old_stance unless old_stance == 'offensive'
